name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 1% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$5.0900. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$5.1000, stop A$4.8807, target A$5.7579 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
